text: - iv. Failure  of  Contractor  to  demand  such  certificate  or  other  evidence  of  full  compliance  with  these insurance  requirements  or  failure  of  Contractor  to  identify  a  deficiency  from  evidence  that  is provided  shall  not  be  construed  as  a  waiver  of  the  Subcontractor's  obligation  to  maintain  such insurance.
